# Watch Paint Dry

> Watch Paint Dry (www.watchpaintdry.net) is a deliberately pointless,
> deeply relaxing web toy: a wall of fresh pink paint, a timer that tracks
> how long you have been staring at it, and achievements for your patience.

The whole site is one interactive screen. Paint the wall, watch it dry,
listen to optional ambient audio, and climb patience levels from Beginner
upward. Stats (longest session, total visits, clicks) and unlockable
achievements are stored locally in the browser — there are no accounts
and no tracking.

Watch Paint Dry is part of SWYMBLE Labs, the experiments arm of the
SWYMBLE software studio.

## Contact

Site: https://swymble.com
Labs: https://swymble.com/labs
